name: Daytona Beach Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Hot Italian sausage, sliced ½ inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat, onions, and garlic in olive oil until no longer pink.
- Drain excess fat from the pot.
2. Return all ingredients to the pot and stir well.
3. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for about 2½ hours.
4. Stir cornmeal with beef stock (if thickening is needed) before adding back to the pot.
5. For crockpot version: Combine all ingredients in the crockpot. Cook on high for 4 hours or on low for 8 hours, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve and enjoy!
